reviews.comment:
Bastante incómodo para cargar nafta pero buena la atención. Una cosa muy importante que tienen que cambiar es el compresor para inflar neumáticos, no puede estar ubicado al lado del lavadero, tuve que decirle al chico que para mientras inflaba pq me estaba mojando con el agua que salpicaba

(Translated by Google)
It was quite inconvenient to get gas at the station, but the service was good. One very important thing they need to change is the tire inflator; it can't be located next to the car wash. I had to tell the guy to stop while he was inflating the tires because I was getting wet from the splashing water.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Marcelo, tomamos tu consejo y vamos a procurar cambiar el lugar del medidor de aire.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención cómo en todas las sucursales del ACA. Los combustibles más caros que en capital federal (+$50 aprox x litro)

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, as in all ACA branches. Fuel prices are higher than in the capital (approximately $50 more per liter).
